basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advertisement No. NITW/2026/Ch.E/ChA/ANRF IRG/JRF. The detailed notification has been published on the official website https://www.nitw.ac.in/. Candidates who meet the prescribed age criteria (maximum 28 years for GEN/GEN-EWS, 31 years for OBC-NCL, and 33 years for SC/ ST/ PwD/ Female candidates) and hold M.E./ M.Tech./ M.Sc./ M.S. or B.E./ B.Tech in the relevant discipline can now submit their online applications up to 05 July 2026. Dire

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years for GEN/GEN-EWS, 31 years for OBC-NCL, 33 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years for General/General-EWS candidates. Age Relaxation: OBC-NCL: 31 years SC/ST/PwD/Female: 33 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./ M.Tech/ M.Sc./ M.S. or B.E./ B.Tech in relevant fields
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc./M.S. degree in Chemical Engineering/ Petrochemical/ Materials/ Metallurgical/Chemistry/Energy Engineering or other specializations relevant to Heterogeneous Catalysis, with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG levels for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL categories, and a minimum of 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD categories. B.E. or B. Tech degree in Chemical Engineering/ Petrochemical/ Energy Engineering/ Materials or other specializations relevant to Heterogeneous Catalysis, are eligible if they have secured at least 65% aggregate marks or 7.0 CGPA for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL categories, and at least 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA for SC, ST, and PwD categories. GATE/NET qualification is preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹37,000/- per month for the first two years and ₹42,000/- per month for the third year
salary_details.details: ₹37,000/- per month for the first two years. ₹42,000/- per month for the third year. This is as per ANRF norms for selected non-GATE/NET candidates.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Warangal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc./M.S. degree in Chemical Engineering/ Petrochemical/ Materials/ Metallurgical/Chemistry/Energy Engineering or other specializations relevant to Heterogeneous Catalysis, with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG levels for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL categories, and a minimum of 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD categories. B.E. or B. Tech degree in Chemical Engineering/ Petrochemical/ Energy Engineering/ Materials or other specializations relevant to Heterogeneous Catalysis, are eligible if they have secured at least 65% aggregate marks or 7.0 CGPA for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL categories, and at least 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA for SC, ST, and PwD categories. GATE/NET qualification is preferred.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
content_sections.text: ₹37,000/- per month for the first two years. ₹42,000/- per month for the third year. This is as per ANRF norms for selected non-GATE/NET candidates.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Warangal is 05-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc./M.S. or B.E./B.Tech degree in relevant fields like Chemical Engineering, Petrochemical, Materials, or Chemistry, with specific aggregate marks or CGPA requirements.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary is ₹37,000/- per month for the first two years and ₹42,000/- per month for the third year, as per ANRF norms for non-GATE/NET candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the JRF application?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit is 28 years for General/GEN-EWS candidates, with relaxations for OBC-NCL (31 years) and SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates (33 years).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the provided Google Form link, along with a detailed bio-data and scanned educational certificates as a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE/NET qualification mandatory for the JRF position?
faq.answer: GATE/NET qualification is preferred but not mandatory. The salary structure is mentioned as per ANRF norms for non-GATE/NET candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is advised to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position announced by NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.
